MUSC811 Doctoral Opera Techniques (2 Credits) Techniques for opera performance: Improvisation; Acting I, Scene Study I; and Movement I. Practical application of styles, techniques to operat e repertoire, and methodology seminar. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Credit Only Granted for: MUSC611 or MUSC811.
